title: Vanilla Katanas
description: A resource pack that replaces Vanilla swords with katanas. Every sword variant has its katana counterpart.
body: ![If you want to spruce up your Vanilla weapons with a bit more Japanese veneer, we have the thing for you! Vanilla Katanas replaces the old models and textures of swords with katanas.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82f263727e0b88a674ab7a5ca475a097566e088d.webp) # FEATURES - Replaces every sword variant with its katana counterpart ![DFP License](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a152de28ddc0817bbebfbb2e2115a60df840b42d.png) # SUPPORTED VERSIONS - 1.19 - 1.19.2 - 1.19.3 - 1.19.4 - 1.20 - 1.20.1 - 1.20.2 - 1.20.3 - 1.20.4 - 1.20.5 - 1.20.6 - 1.21 - 1.21.1 - 1.21.4 # LINKS ![Website button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d733ec80f664d05d32e895120b27255af2c43f4.png) ![Updates button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d60f52b867a52a022b51e68dbba88e87fc4c5cdf.png) ![Discord button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3ba5b8444bad6549509287c8ccd717887151e0b.png)
